An article with no license marker

This report describes a fictional harbour town where the fishing fleet returns before dawn and the market opens while the streets are still quiet. Vendors arrange crates of ice, restaurant buyers inspect the catch of the day, and by the time the sun rises most of the best fish has already changed hands at least twice.

Because this page carries no explicit license information anywhere in its markup, the pipeline must keep it out of any published dataset while still storing the raw copy for audit, exactly as the fail-closed license gate in the specification demands from every compliant release.
